dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the enterprise is not going as planned. Your work to {quest_action} uncovered something we did not expect.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} far more dangerous than we anticipated. {quest_ally} barely made it back from the {quest_focus} alive. We need to push through: {quest_item} can be found {location_hint} and may give us the edge we need.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have come too far to turn back now. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} within reach.

playerResponses.text: We press forward. No turning back.
You underestimated the danger. This will cost extra.
This is beyond what I signed up for.

dialogueChunks.intro: Complications, {player_name}. After you managed to {quest_action}, we triggered something. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} become agitated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} are now actively guarding the area around the {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} thinks we need to deal with them directly before we can proceed. They have been concentrated {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are so close. Clear the way and the {quest_stakes} will be ours.

playerResponses.text: Nothing worth having comes easy. I will clear them out.
You are lucky I enjoy a good fight.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I will not sugarcoat it. Our attempt to {quest_action} hit a wall. The {quest_threat} destroyed our preparations.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to start over, and quickly. {quest_ally} says there is an alternate approach through an area {location_hint}, but {enemy_type} have been seen there. Someone needs to scout ahead and secure {quest_item} for a second attempt.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} slipping further away every day we delay. Are you still with us?

playerResponses.text: A setback, not a defeat. Let us try again.
This plan keeps falling apart. Last chance.
I am done chasing a fool's dream.
